title: Rights During Arrest
summary: A person cannot be arrested arbitrarily. The police must follow strict legal procedures during arrest.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Police must have valid legal reasons to arrest you and must inform you of those reasons.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Illegal arrests violate personal liberty and constitutional rights.

whenItApplies: You are being arrested or detained
Police restrict your freedom of movement
whatPoliceMustDo: Allow you to inform a friend or family member
Produce you before a magistrate within 24 hours
whatPoliceCannotDo: Detain beyond 24 hours without court approval

exampleScenario.situation: Police arrest someone for questioning without explaining the reason.
exampleScenario.explanation: Police must inform grounds of arrest immediately.

women: Cannot be arrested at night except in exceptional circumstances
Must be arrested by female officer
children: Cannot be detained in police lockup
Must be produced before Juvenile Justice Board
